mapper.select:
SELECT t.* FROM kb_category_label t WHERE 1 = 1
AND t.id like concat('%',#{kbCategoryLabelEntity.id},'%')
AND t.ct_id like concat('%',#{kbCategoryLabelEntity.ctId},'%')
AND t.l_id like concat('%',#{kbCategoryLabelEntity.lId},'%')
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}

select count(1) from kb_category_label kcl left join kb_model_label kml on kcl.l_id = kml.id left join (select l_id, count(1) as count from kb_basic_label group by l_id) lb on lb.l_id = kml.id
kml.is_deleted = 2
and kcl.ct_id = #{ctId}
and kml.name like concat('%',#{kbModelLabelDto.name},'%')
select klc.* from kb_category_label kcl left join kb_label_category klc on kcl.l_id = klc.id where kcl.l_id = #{labelId}

select * from kb_category_label where l_id in
#{id}

select kml.*,klc.name as ctName from kb_category_label kcl left join kb_model_label kml on kcl.l_id = kml.id left join kb_label_category klc on kcl.ct_id = klc.id where kml.is_deleted = 2 and kcl.ct_id in
#{id}

select * from kb_label_category where id in
#{id}
